name: HWR_XP_EXTENSION_B
description: This is the table for the experience store extensions.

columns.Name: EXTENSION_ID
columns.Comments: The Unique database identifier for this extension.

columns.Name: CONTEXT_ID
columns.Comments: The Unique database identifier for the context.

columns.Name: ACTIVITY_ID
columns.Comments: The Unique database identifier for this activity.

columns.Name: RESULT_ID
columns.Comments: The Unique database identifier for this result.

columns.Name: ID_IRI
columns.Comments: The id iri for this extension. The ID should follow the IRI sandard.

columns.Name: VALUE
columns.Comments: The value for this extension. Can be null.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
